FIGHTER-FIGHTER_HEADBAND.title: Fighter's Headband
FIGHTER-FIGHTER_HEADBAND.description: Counter Hit: +20% damage when attacking NL enemies with Attack intent, gain +2 Frames. NL Punish Counter: fully blocking an enemy NL Attack makes your next attack NL deal +20% and grant +4 Frames.
FIGHTER-FIGHTER_HEADBAND.flavor: A worn headband, infused with the spirit of countless battles.
FIGHTER-SPIRIT_CHARM.title: Spirit Charm
FIGHTER-SPIRIT_CHARM.description: Start combat with 6 Fighting Spirit. NL Gain 1 each turn. NL Burnout at 0: 2 Weak, 2 Vulnerable.
FIGHTER-SPIRIT_CHARM.flavor: Burns bright, but beware the flame that gutters.
